forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.message: You don't have the required permissions to access the admin panel. Contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.

host-missing-permission.title: There's a problem with your account
host-missing-permission.message: We see you're a host but your admin panel access is disabled. This is likely a missing config on your account. Drop us a line and we'll sort it out.

generic.title: Restricted area
generic.message: This area is for Hospeda admins and hosts. Your account doesn't have access. If you think this is a mistake, contact us or sign in with another account.

permissions.pageDescription: This page displays all permission categories available in the system. Permissions are organized by domain and control access to specific features and resources. Individual permission details are managed through role assignments.
permissions.infoNoteDesc: Individual permission details and their assignments to roles are available in the Roles page. Users inherit permissions based on their assigned role.

roles.pageDescription: System roles define user access levels and permissions. Each role inherits capabilities based on their position in the hierarchy. Roles are managed at the system level and cannot be modified from this interface.
roles.infoNoteDesc: Individual permission details are managed through the Permissions page. Users can be assigned to roles from the User Management section.

SUPER_ADMIN.name: Super Admin
SUPER_ADMIN.description: Full system access with all permissions including system-level actions

ADMIN.name: Admin
ADMIN.description: Manages platform content, users, and most administrative functions

CLIENT_MANAGER.name: Client Manager
CLIENT_MANAGER.description: Manages client accounts, billing, subscriptions, and business analytics

EDITOR.name: Editor
EDITOR.description: Creates and edits events, posts, and editorial content

HOST.name: Host
HOST.description: Accommodation owner who manages their own listings

USER.name: User
USER.description: Registered user of the public portal with basic interaction capabilities

SPONSOR.name: Sponsor
SPONSOR.description: External business sponsor with access to sponsorship management and analytics

GUEST.name: Guest
GUEST.description: Public visitor without authentication, limited to viewing public content

SYSTEM.name: System
SYSTEM.description: Reserved non-loginable account used as assignedById for automated tag assignments (seeds, cron jobs, webhooks). Not visible in UI.

capabilities.cap1: Used internally for automated operations only

activity.noActivityDesc: Activity tracking is not yet implemented. When available, this section will display login history, content interactions, and administrative actions performed by this user.
activity.comingSoonDesc: Activity history tracking will include login history, IP addresses, device information, content creation/editing events, permission changes, and administrative actions. This will provide a complete audit trail for user activities.

permissions.inheritedDesc: This user inherits all permissions associated with the
permissions.inheritedNote: Role-based permissions are managed through the Roles page and apply to all users with the same role.
permissions.viewRoleDetailsDesc: To see the complete list of permissions for the
permissions.directOverridesDesc: Permissions assigned directly to this user (beyond their role)
permissions.noDirectOverridesDesc: This user only uses permissions from their role
permissions.futureFeatureDesc: Permission management functionality will be available in a future update. This will allow administrators to grant or revoke specific permissions at the user level, overriding role defaults.
permissions.confirmRemoveDesc: The user will revert to their role's permissions
permissions.sensitivePermissionWarning: This permission has broad scope. Make sure the user should have it.
permissions.changesTakeEffectNextRequest: Changes take effect on the user's next request

sponsorship.noteDesc: Advanced sponsorship management features will be available in a future update.
sponsorship.noSponsorshipDesc: This post does not have a sponsor assigned yet.
sponsorship.noteDescNoSponsor: Sponsorship management features will be available in a future update. You will be able to assign sponsors, configure sponsorship types, and manage sponsorship periods.

aiGenerate.description: Provide a topic and key points; AI will draft a post for you to review.
aiGenerate.topicPlaceholder: E.g.: Carnival guide in Concepción del Uruguay
aiGenerate.errorModeration: The generated content did not pass moderation. Try rephrasing your points.
aiGenerate.errorCeiling: Cost limit reached. Please try again later.
aiGenerate.errorExhausted: The AI service is temporarily unavailable.
aiGenerate.errorGeneric: Could not generate the draft. Please try again.

attendees.underDevelopment: The attendee registration and tracking system is currently under development.
attendees.comingSoonDesc: The full attendee management system will be available in a future update. Features will include:
attendees.featureViewManage: View and manage all registered attendees
attendees.featureCheckin: Check-in functionality with QR code scanning
attendees.featureNotifications: Send notifications and updates to attendees
attendees.featureWaitlists: Manage waitlists when events reach capacity

tickets.comingSoonDesc: Advanced ticket management features will be available in a future update. You will be able to:
tickets.featureTicketTypes: Create multiple ticket types and tiers
tickets.featureDynamicPricing: Set dynamic pricing and early bird discounts
tickets.featureQr: Generate QR codes for ticket validation

locationEvents.noEvents: No events found at this location.
locationEvents.comingSoonDesc: This tab will display all events held at this location, including past, current, and upcoming events with quick actions.

organizerEvents.noEvents: No events found for this organizer.
organizerEvents.comingSoonDesc: This tab will display all events organized by this organizer, including past, current, and upcoming events with quick actions.

amenities.empty: This accommodation has no amenities assigned.

reviews.noReviews: No reviews yet for this accommodation.
reviews.detailedNote: Detailed review listings will be available in a future update. Currently showing aggregated review statistics only.
reviews.respondProPremium: Responding to reviews is available on Pro and Premium plans
reviews.respondUpgrade: Upgrade your plan to publicly respond to your guests' reviews.
reviews.respondComingSoon: The review response feature will be available soon.

gallery.noImages: No images available for this accommodation.

exchangeRates.infoNote: Note: Rates are updated automatically according to the configuration. Manual overrides take priority over automatic rates.
exchangeRates.historyDesc: View the history of exchange rate changes over time
exchangeRates.configDesc: Configure how and when exchange rates are updated automatically
